item.title: misty-step/harness-kit v1.0.0
item.description:
New Features

  • You can now use the /deps skill for semantic dependency management with reachability analysis
  • You can now leverage agent-first workflow capabilities including distributed issue tracking via git-bug, Dagger CI integration, and atomic claim protocols
  • You can now scaffold project-local harness configurations using /harness scaffold mode for QA skill generation and demo templates
  • You can now access consolidated global skills (74 skills from 262) with budget-aware selection and multi-provider code review support across Thinktank, Codex, and Gemini

Improvements

  • The bootstrap system now resolves .spellbook.yaml from git toplevel instead of current directory and honors skill allowlists for cleaner installations
  • The focus system now includes second-stage selection heuristics and selection telemetry for better skill targeting across harnesses
  • The tailor system now supports cross-harness installation with canonical .agents/ directories and per-harness symlinks for unified agent management
  • The verdict system now enforces git-native review workflows with persistent scoring and evidence-based quality gates

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed autopilot workflow to create feature branches before spawning builders and stop before merge with LGTM protocol instead of auto-merge
  • Fixed roster lane dispatch scoping to target repositories and bound dispatch execution to prevent incorrect routing
  • Fixed CI gates to exclude skills/.external from source context and reject unresolved conflict markers during validation
  • Fixed skill discovery to use filesystem scanning instead of registry.yaml and properly handle external skill synchronization
